data.title: Law of Simplicity
data.description: Amazon's platform is designed with a focus on simplicity to enhance user experience.
data.technical_spec: Minimalistic design principles and easy navigation structure.

data.title: Fitts's Law
data.description: Elements are strategically placed to improve usability and reduce the effort required to interact with them.
data.technical_spec: Optimized button sizes and placement for quick access.

data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Decision-making time is optimized by limiting complex options.
data.technical_spec: Simplified category hierarchies and search functionalities.

data.title: Jakob's Law
data.description: Design standards are maintained to meet user expectations based on experiences from other web services.
data.technical_spec: Consistent UI elements and interaction patterns.

data.title: Miller's Law
data.description: Information chunks are maintained within human cognitive limits to aid comprehension.
data.technical_spec: Product details and reviews are formatted in digestible sections.
